BigFish{OnReach}: A sinuous shadow writhes beneath the water!
BigFish{OnEnd}: You lose sight of the sinuous shadow...
313: The writhing shadow appears beneath the water once more!

BigFish{OnReach}: A colossal shadow lurks beneath the waves...
BigFish{OnEnd}: You lose sight of the colossal shadow...
333: The colossal shadow appears beneath the water once more!
